records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you for calling me again, Dame Grace! I'll give it my all to get you there safely!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you for calling me again, Dame Grace! I'll give it my all to get you there safely!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you for calling me again, Dame Grace! I'll give it my all to get you there safely!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The pleasure is mine, Mr. Clinton.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The pleasure is mine, Mr. Clinton.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The pleasure is mine, Mr. Clinton.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha. Milady, I'm counting on you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha. Milady, I'm counting on you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha. Milady, I'm counting on you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She's married now!
records.m_Talk_DEU: She's married now!
records.m_Talk_FRA: She's married now!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh? No wonder she seems more mature.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh? No wonder she seems more mature.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh? No wonder she seems more mature.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Are we seriously riding with this coachman again?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Are we seriously riding with this coachman again?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Are we seriously riding with this coachman again?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mr. Clinton is one of the finest coachmen in the Empire.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mr. Clinton is one of the finest coachmen in the Empire.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mr. Clinton is one of the finest coachmen in the Empire.

records.m_Talk_ENG: For an expedition this dangerous, you won't find a better choice.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For an expedition this dangerous, you won't find a better choice.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For an expedition this dangerous, you won't find a better choice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's...
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's...
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's...

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you're worried about the bumps, I can have a handrail installed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you're worried about the bumps, I can have a handrail installed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you're worried about the bumps, I can have a handrail installed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No need.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No need.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No need.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha. If there's nothing else, then let's be off.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha. If there's nothing else, then let's be off.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha. If there's nothing else, then let's be off.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ma'am. Do you have a moment?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ma'am. Do you have a moment?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ma'am. Do you have a moment?

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's something I'd like to ask...
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's something I'd like to ask...
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's something I'd like to ask...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh my. Have you finally decided to ask the <color=#ffd34c>question</color> you couldn't last time?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh my. Have you finally decided to ask the <color=#ffd34c>question</color> you couldn't last time?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh my. Have you finally decided to ask the <color=#ffd34c>question</color> you couldn't last time?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm joking. Unless it's something I truly can't answer, I'll do my best. Go ahead.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm joking. Unless it's something I truly can't answer, I'll do my best. Go ahead.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm joking. Unless it's something I truly can't answer, I'll do my best. Go ahead.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's nothing major, I was just curious about the formation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's nothing major, I was just curious about the formation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's nothing major, I was just curious about the formation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It doesn't look suited for long-range movement.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It doesn't look suited for long-range movement.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It doesn't look suited for long-range movement.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A valid point. Tactically, a phalanx is a defensive formation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A valid point. Tactically, a phalanx is a defensive formation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A valid point. Tactically, a phalanx is a defensive formation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But considering the soldiers are here to guard me, it's the best fit for our current situation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But considering the soldiers are here to guard me, it's the best fit for our current situation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But considering the soldiers are here to guard me, it's the best fit for our current situation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Guard you? All of them?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Guard you? All of them?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Guard you? All of them?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Guard you from wh
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Guard you from wh
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Guard you from wh
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: All units, halt! Large group of C.O.s spotted ahead!
records.m_Talk_DEU: All units, halt! Large group of C.O.s spotted ahead!
records.m_Talk_FRA: All units, halt! Large group of C.O.s spotted ahead!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ready your weapons! Engage before they reach us!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ready your weapons! Engage before they reach us!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ready your weapons! Engage before they reach us!

records.m_Talk_ENG: C.O.s...? I was told we'd be traveling through safe zones. This is odd.
records.m_Talk_DEU: C.O.s...? I was told we'd be traveling through safe zones. This is odd.
records.m_Talk_FRA: C.O.s...? I was told we'd be traveling through safe zones. This is odd.

records.m_Talk_ENG: C.O.s wander in search of potential they couldn't hold onto.
records.m_Talk_DEU: C.O.s wander in search of potential they couldn't hold onto.
records.m_Talk_FRA: C.O.s wander in search of potential they couldn't hold onto.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And with such a strong starlight presence here, of course they'd be drawn in like moths to a flame.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And with such a strong starlight presence here, of course they'd be drawn in like moths to a flame.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And with such a strong starlight presence here, of course they'd be drawn in like moths to a flame.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sir Ferron. Give me a status report.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sir Ferron. Give me a status report.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sir Ferron. Give me a status report.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Packs of beasts and flying C.O.s moving together roughly a mile ahead.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Packs of beasts and flying C.O.s moving together roughly a mile ahead.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Packs of beasts and flying C.O.s moving together roughly a mile ahead.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Their numbers aren't high, but since most are airborne, we'll need to spread out to handle them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Their numbers aren't high, but since most are airborne, we'll need to spread out to handle them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Their numbers aren't high, but since most are airborne, we'll need to spread out to handle them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No. We'll break through with <color=#ffd34c>Armaments</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No. We'll break through with <color=#ffd34c>Armaments</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No. We'll break through with <color=#ffd34c>Armaments</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll draw their attention and funnel them into one spot.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll draw their attention and funnel them into one spot.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll draw their attention and funnel them into one spot.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sir Ferron, lead the knights capable of using Armaments and circle around to flank them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sir Ferron, lead the knights capable of using Armaments and circle around to flank them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sir Ferron, lead the knights capable of using Armaments and circle around to flank them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But Dame Grace. If you use the Armament's power...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But Dame Grace. If you use the Armament's power...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But Dame Grace. If you use the Armament's power...

records.m_Talk_ENG: We might draw in other C.O.s farther out.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We might draw in other C.O.s farther out.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We might draw in other C.O.s farther out.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But if we don't use the Armament, we'll just be throwing our soldiers into the meat grinder.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But if we don't use the Armament, we'll just be throwing our soldiers into the meat grinder.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But if we don't use the Armament, we'll just be throwing our soldiers into the meat grinder.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If there's even a small chance to save more lives, shouldn't we take it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If there's even a small chance to save more lives, shouldn't we take it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If there's even a small chance to save more lives, shouldn't we take it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, understood.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, understood.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, understood.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If it's not too much to ask, I'd like to place you at the vanguard, Esther.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If it's not too much to ask, I'd like to place you at the vanguard, Esther.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If it's not too much to ask, I'd like to place you at the vanguard, Esther.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're the commander here, ma'am. Feel free to ask whatever you like.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're the commander here, ma'am. Feel free to ask whatever you like.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're the commander here, ma'am. Feel free to ask whatever you like.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Anything else, besides leading the charge?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Anything else, besides leading the charge?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Anything else, besides leading the charge?

records.m_Talk_ENG: In the Empire, leading the vanguard also means carrying the banner.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In the Empire, leading the vanguard also means carrying the banner.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In the Empire, leading the vanguard also means carrying the banner.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you're willing, would you carry the Empire's flag into battle?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you're willing, would you carry the Empire's flag into battle?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you're willing, would you carry the Empire's flag into battle?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll have to decline.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll have to decline.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll have to decline.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, just teasing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, just teasing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, just teasing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If there's anything else... Hmm.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If there's anything else... Hmm.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If there's anything else... Hmm.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't push yourself too much, Esther.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't push yourself too much, Esther.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't push yourself too much, Esther.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Understood.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Understood.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Understood.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll carry out your command.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll carry out your command.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll carry out your command.
